titleStmt.title: SII 26.155: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 155. (A.R. No. 147 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: In the same place as above.

This inscription records a gift of land made by a certain Iyāḻvallāṉ Pāṇḍiyan alias Vikkiramachōḻa Iruṅgōḷaṉ, a mudali of the king. The lands gifted are stated to be situated in Kīraṉūr in Poṅgalūṟkkā-nāḍu. The gift was made to the god of the temple of Vīrachōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār in Koḻumum, and it was for the merit of the donor and for celebrating the Kārttigai festival, for food offerings to the god and for the taking out in procession of the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī
vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2
ṇṭāvatiṉ Etirāvatu mu
talikaḷil Iyāḻvallāṉ pāṇṭiya
ṉāṉa vikkiramacoḻa Iruṅkoḷaṉe
ṉ karaivaḻināṭṭuk koḻumattu Āḷu
ṭaiyār viracoḷiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku E
ṉakku naṉṟāka nāṉ kaṇṭa tirukkāttikai taṉma
ttukku veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku nāṉ viṭṭa nilamāva
tu poṅkaluṟkkānāṭṭuk kiraṉūril ṭṭa
Iṉnilam Araimāvukku nāṉkellaiyāvatu veḷāṉ
nilattukku vaṭakku ppallavaraiyaṉ nilattu
kkuk kiḻakkum kompūticeykku teṟkum kulottu
ṅka pallavaraiyaṉ nilattukku meṟkum Iṉṉānkel
laikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Araimāvum pūluvaṉṉemperumāḷ
nilattukku nāṅkellaikūṭimākāṇikku kiḻ pi
ḷḷaiyaṉ ceykku meṟkum naṭuvuḷpaṭṭa nilam Araikkā
ṇiyum ciṟukkuḷattu virapāṇṭi nilattukku nāṉkellai
ciṅkātaṉ ceykku meṟkum Eṉ Ūrāṇmaikkā
ṇikku kiḻakkum pantalūr Ūrāṉ makaṉ Uṭaiyāṉ cey
kku teṟkum Aḻakiyacoḻa yaraiyaṉ ceykku vaṭakkum I
ṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam kāṇiyum koṅkūril ti
pattaṉ nilattukku nāṉkellai ñāṉaventaṉ ceyk
kuk kiḻakkum tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyāṉ ceykku vaṭakkum kiraṉū
r maruttukkoḻi Āṇṭān cey(y)kku teṟkum Ūrāṇmai
kaṇṇāṟṟuk kavarukku meṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellai vaṭanilamā
kāṇiyum meṟpaṭi nāṉnilam kovaṉ nakkaṉ ceykku meṟ
kum ceṉai Aṅkarāyaṉ ceykku teṟkum ceramāṉtoḻaṉ
ceykkuk kiḻakkum Avaṉāci cceykku vaṭakkum Āka
Iṉṉānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi mu
ntirikaiyum Ākanilam Oru māvarai muntirikaiyum Ikko
yil tāṉattār tāṅkaḷe Aṭaiyakuṭuttut tirukkalatti�
t tāmam Innilattāl Uḷḷa nellukku neṟkaveṇṭuma
ruppaṇṇikāram viñcaṉaṅkaḷ Amutupaṭi tiruviḷakku Uṭpa
ṭavum nāyakarai Ūrileḻuntaruvippārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi
ttarumam ceykaikku I rul
Digital edition of SII 26.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
